headline: Molina Healthcare Earnings Beat Estimates. The Medicaid Insurer Is Confronting Investor Doubts.
summary: Molina healthcare has seen its stock edge down in recent days amid concerns about Medicaid cost pressures.

headline: Elevance Health (ELV) Stock Still Looks Reasonable After A 43% Run
summary: Elevance Health has climbed 42.6% over the past year, yet the broader valuation checks still lean toward the stock looking cheap rather than stretched at current levels. The 42.6% one-year return puts Elevance Health firmly in the group of recent outperformers, raising the question of how much value is already reflected in the price. Recent earnings strength and raised earnings expectations can support the case for higher earnings power over time, while margin pressure and membership...
